growth_records.cite: Rüger M et al. Species-specific viability analysis of Pseudomonas aeruginosa, Burkholderia cepacia and Staphylococcus aureus in mixed culture by flow cytometry. BMC Microbiology (2014). DOI:10.1186/1471-2180-14-56. [PMC3995885]
growth_records.snippet: B. c. 0.77 ± 0.02 0-6 (pure culture) ... determined by linear regression from log e cell concentrations during exponential growth phase.
growth_records.notes: mu_max = 0.77 ± 0.02 h^-1 (pure culture, exponential phase 0-6 h), Table 1. doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.693147/0.77 = 0.900 h. No quantitative uptake/secretion rates (substrates measured only qualitatively).

growth_records.cite: Rüger M et al. Species-specific viability analysis of Pseudomonas aeruginosa, Burkholderia cepacia and Staphylococcus aureus in mixed culture by flow cytometry. BMC Microbiology (2014). DOI:10.1186/1471-2180-14-56. [PMC3995885]
growth_records.snippet: B. c. ... 0.86 ± 0.09 0-6 (mixed culture); growth stagnated in mixed culture after 6 h of cultivation.
growth_records.notes: mu_max = 0.86 ± 0.09 h^-1 in three-species mixed (co-)culture, exponential phase 0-6 h, Table 1. doubling_time = ln2/mu = 0.693147/0.86 = 0.806 h. Growth stagnated after 6 h (competition/pyocins from P. aeruginosa). No quantitative uptake/secretion rates.
